rationale.R1.2: Reviewing the section requires verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain from ablation results to conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation centrally involves checking alignment between reported pass@1 scores and claims about the critique loop's benefits.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level writing for grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central expected responsibility in reviewing the section.
rationale.RX.1: The review should assess whether uncertainties in the ablation configurations and results are adequately disclosed.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing given the conclusions drawn from the empirical data in the section.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the discussion adheres to the scope of the ablations on specific benchmarks is centrally expected.
rationale.RX.4: Considering downstream harms of the multi-agent framework for code generation is peripheral to the review.
rationale.RX.5: Checking provenance and traceability of the benchmarks and methods used is a nice-to-have aspect of the review.
